Part.Source:
if &IsApagarPedidos = true //Conta Pedidos For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod // Where FilCod = &FilCod Where PedCliCod = &PesCod when not &PesCod.IsEmpty() Where PedDtaEms >= &PedDtaEms when not &PedDtaEms.IsEmpty() Where PedDtaEms <= &PedDtaEms_to when not &PedDtaEms_to.IsEmpty() Where PedSts = Status_Pedido.CANCELADO and PedStsFin = Status_Financeiro.CANCELADO
&Total += 1 EndFor EndIF
if &IsApagarDuplicatas = true //Conta Duplicatas For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, CreCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod // Where FilCod = &FilCod Where CreCliCod = &PesCod when not &PesCod.IsEmpty() Where CreDtaEms >= &PedDtaEms when not &PedDtaEms.IsEmpty() Where CreDtaEms <= &PedDtaEms_to when not &PedDtaEms_to.IsEmpty() Where CreSts = Status_Pedido.CANCELADO
&Total += 1 EndFor EndIF
&Count = 0 &Percentual = 0 &ProgressIni = serverNow() do 'Atualiza'
if &IsApagarPedidos = true //Deleta Conta Pedidos For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod // Where FilCod = &FilCod Where PedCliCod = &PesCod when not &PesCod.IsEmpty() Where PedDtaEms >= &PedDtaEms when not &PedDtaEms.IsEmpty() Where PedDtaEms <= &PedDtaEms_to when not &PedDtaEms_to.IsEmpty() Where PedSts = Status_Pedido.CANCELADO and PedStsFin = Status_Financeiro.CANCELADO &QtdPedidos += 1 &Count += 1 If &Count > 0 &Percentual = round((&Count / &Total) * 100, 0) EndIF If &Percentual >= 100 &Percentual = 99 EndIf do 'Atualiza'
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, PedItmCod Delete EndFor
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, PedCriCod Delete EndFor
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod,PedComEspVenCod Delete EndFor
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod,HisItmCod Delete EndFor
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod,PedTmpDupCod Delete EndFor
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod,PedRefCod Delete EndFor
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod,PedAnxCod Delete EndFor
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, PedVctCod Delete EndFor
delete EndFor
Commit EndiF
if &IsApagarDuplicatas = true //Deleta Conta Duplicatas For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, CreCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod // Where FilCod = &FilCod Where CreCliCod = &PesCod when not &PesCod.IsEmpty() Where CreDtaEms >= &PedDtaEms when not &PedDtaEms.IsEmpty() Where CreDtaEms <= &PedDtaEms_to when not &PedDtaEms_to.IsEmpty() Where CreSts = Status_Pedido.CANCELADO &QtdDUplicatas += 1 &Count += 1 If &Count > 0 &Percentual = round((&Count / &Total) * 100, 0) EndIF If &Percentual >= 100 &Percentual = 99 EndIf do 'Atualiza'
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, CreCod, CrePagCod delete EndFor
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, CreCod, CreCobCod delete EndFor
Delete EndFor
Commit EndIF
&Percentual = 100 &ProgressFin = serverNow() &ProgressLogXml = 'Apagadado (' +trim(toformattedString(&QtdPedidos))+ ') Pedidos (' +trim(toformattedString(&QtdDUplicatas))+ ') Duplicatas.' do 'Atualiza'
Sub 'Atualiza' for each Order ProgressId where ProgressId = &ProgressId ProgressValue = &Percentual ProgressLogXml = &ProgressLogXml ProgressFin = &ProgressFin ProgressIni = &Progressini When none new ProgressId = &ProgressId ProgressValue = &Percentual ProgressLogXml = &ProgressLogXml ProgressFin = &ProgressFin ProgressIni = &Progressini Endnew endfor
commit EndSub
parm(in:&ProgressId, in:&EmpCod, in:&FilCod, in:&IsApagarDuplicatas, in:&IsApagarPedidos, in:&PedDtaEms, in:&PedDtaEms_to, in:&PesCod);
